reuse_metadata.native_query_output_buffer_reuse_note: prepared_device_buffers mode reuses native OptiX device query/output buffers; the current Python API still downloads compact group flags and does not claim true zero-copy

warmup_protocol.minimum_default: 7 repeats with 2 warmup rows for local evidence
warmup_protocol.rule: drop the first warmup_count rows; report medians over remaining tail rows
